news.summary: First Horizon Corporation (NYSE: FHN) from Memphis reported a net income available to common shareholders of $213 million, translating to an earnings per share (EPS) of $0.41. This marks a $0.12 increase from the previous quarter. On an adjusted basis, the company reported $217 million in net income or $0.42 EPS, showing a decrease of $0.01 from the prior quarter. The financial results were announced on April 16, 2025.
news.headline: First Horizon Corporation reports strong Q1 2025 results: Net income $213M, EPS $0.41 (up $0.12 from prior quarter), adjusted EPS $0.42 (down $0.01).

news.summary: In Sunnyvale, California on April 16, 2025, Scout AI Inc. revealed its debut from stealth mode, declaring its ambitious goal to develop the AGI brain for defense robotics. The company disclosed a successful $15 million seed funding round, which was oversubscribed, with Align Ventures and Booz leading the investment.
news.headline: Scout AI comes out of stealth mode with $15M seed funding, secures 2 DoD contracts, reveals Fury model for defense.

news.summary: Kennametal Inc. (NYSE: KMT) is set to conduct its Q3 fiscal year 2025 earnings call on May 7, 2025, in Pittsburgh. The press release and presentation will be published on the company's website ahead of the market opening on the same day. The specific details regarding the conference call will be released closer to the scheduled date.
news.headline: Kennametal (NYSE: KMT) to host Q3 fiscal 2025 earnings call on May 7. Details to be released before market opening.

news.summary: Valens Semiconductor, a prominent player in advanced connectivity solutions, is set to unveil its financial performance for the first quarter of 2025 on May 7, 2025, prior to the market launch. This Israel-based company, listed on the NYSE as VLN, has gained recognition for its high-performance technologies. Key figures such as revenue, profits, and market strategies will be disclosed in the upcoming report. Gideon Ben Zvi, serving as the Chief Executive Officer of Valens Semiconductor, is likely to provide insights during the subsequent conference call scheduled for investors and analysts.
news.headline: Valens Semiconductor (NYSE: VLN) to report Q1 2025 financial results on May 7, 2025 before market opens.

news.summary: Bitcoin's comparative underperformance against gold this year might change soon, as crypto expert Anthony Pompliano believes historical data suggests a surge in Bitcoin returns is imminent. Pompliano mentioned on CNBC's Squawk Box that Bitcoin is showing signs of potential growth and is likely to outperform gold in the upcoming months. Despite Bitcoin being down about 10% and gold up 20% at the start of the year, both assets have seen a 35% increase over a one-year period. Pompliano explained that typically, gold leads such market rallies, with Bitcoin following suit but with a stronger, delayed surge. "When gold rallies, approximately 100 days later, Bitcoin not only catches up but surpasses it," Pompliano expressed.
news.headline: Crypto expert Pompliano predicts Bitcoin will surpass gold soon, despite current underperformance. Bitcoin down 10%, gold up 20% YTD, both up 35% in one year. Pompliano expects Bitcoin's rally to follow gold's lead with a 100-day delay. (Character count: 271)
Confused executives present a new challenge for markets reports.

news.summary: A recent report discusses new economic data on job growth in the United States. The report states that the economy added over 300,000 jobs last month, surpassing expectations. The unemployment rate also decreased to 4.2%, the lowest it has been in five years. Additionally, the report highlights the strong performance of the labor market, with job gains seen in various sectors including healthcare, technology, and manufacturing. The data reflects positive trends in the US economy and suggests a promising outlook for the job market in the coming months.
news.headline: United Offers two economic forecasts, cautions on recession risk.

news.summary: Autonomous operations are in need of knowledge to reach their full potential, as emphasized by Vitria, a key player in the AIOps industry. Recently, the company unveiled its revolutionary VIA AI at FutureNet World 2025 event in West London on April 16, 2025. This launch signifies a significant advancement in the field, with Vitria aiming to enhance operations by leveraging the power of artificial intelligence.
news.headline: Vitria debuts VIA AI with Knowledge™ at FutureNet World 2025, emphasizing the importance of knowledge in autonomous operations.

news.summary: GeneDx, a company listed on the IBD 50 stock index, has announced its acquisition of Fabric Genomics for a sum of $84 million. Fabric Genomics specializes in AI-powered genomics research. This acquisition marks a significant move in the growing field of genetics and artificial intelligence. The deal highlights the increasing interest and investment in AI-driven technologies within the genomics industry.
news.headline: GeneDx to acquire Fabric Genomics for up to $84M, specializing in AI-powered genomics.

news.summary: In TASHKENT, Uzbekistan, as of April 16, 2025, Uzum Bank, a prominent neobank in the country, has achieved a significant accomplishment by issuing 1.5 million Visa bank cards. This milestone underscores the increasing interest in fintech solutions within Uzbekistan. This development means that individuals across Uzbekistan now have convenient access to order both plastic and virtual cards through the bank.
news.headline: Uzum Bank in Uzbekistan issues 1.5 million Visa bank cards, expanding fintech solutions nationwide.

news.summary: Citizens Financial Group, Inc. (NYSE: CFG), headquartered in Providence, R.I., has released its first quarter financial results. The company's earnings press release, investor presentation, and financial supplement can be accessed at http://investor.citizensbank.com. These materials will also be submitted to the Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) on a Form 8-K and will be found on the SEC website at www.sec.gov. The company expressed satisfaction with its performance in Q1 and highlighted strong execution during the period. Investors and interested parties can review detailed information and updates on the company's financial standing.
news.headline: Citizens Financial Group Q1 2025: Net income $373M, EPS $0.77. CET1 ratio 10.6%, LDR 77.5%. Full report at http://investor.citizensbank.com.

news.summary: In Albuquerque, New Mexico on April 16, 2025, the Jaynes Corporation, a prominent commercial contractor in the Southwest region, achieved success by securing the esteemed 2025 Construction Safety Excellence Award from the Associated General Contractors of America (AGC CSEA). Jaynes Corporation proudly clinched the top position in the competition, solidifying its status as a leader in ensuring safety within the construction industry.
news.headline: Jaynes Corporation wins the 2025 Construction Safety Excellence Award; awarded 1st place among competitors.
Trump: I will attend the meeting, along with treasury & commerce secretaries, hopefully something can be worked out.
Corporate leaders stunned, posing new challenges for markets as they navigate uncertainties.
Trump: Japan is coming in today to negotiate tariffs & the cost of military support

news.summary: In a recent report, it was revealed that the unemployment rate in the country has risen to 6.5%, marking a significant increase from the previous month. This surge in unemployment has led to approximately 1.5 million individuals losing their jobs. The report also highlighted that the economy experienced a 3.2% contraction in the last quarter, primarily due to the ongoing global pandemic. Additionally, the government announced a new stimulus package worth $20 billion to help businesses and individuals affected by the economic downturn. This development comes as many sectors continue to struggle amidst the uncertain economic climate.
news.headline: United Airlines predicts revenue to reach $4.5 billion, but also cautions about recession risk in the future.

news.summary: On April 16, 2025, Kingsoft Cloud Holdings Limited, a prominent cloud service provider in China, declared the launch of an underwritten public offering. The offering includes 18,500,000 American depositary shares (ADSs), with each ADS representing 15 ordinary shares of the company, totaling 277,500,000 ordinary shares (Firm Shares). Kingsoft Cloud will offer all ADSs and plans to provide the underwriters a 30-day option to purchase additional ADSs. Investors also have the opportunity to opt for ordinary shares of the company, which will be tradable on the Hong Kong Stock Exchange (HKEX), instead of ADSs in this offering.
news.headline: Kingsoft Cloud plans public offering of 18.5 million ADSs, total of 277.5 million ordinary shares, granting underwriters a 30-day option.

news.summary: In Los Angeles, Bloom, a leading cannabis vape brand known for its high-quality products and innovation, has recently achieved ECCO Certification in California. This certification sets higher standards for product testing, accountability, and transparency in the cannabis sector. With the cannabis industry facing diverse regulatory and testing standards across different states and markets, Bloom's certification aims to address the issue of inconsistent and conflicting product outcomes. This move signifies a significant step towards improved quality assurance and reliability in the cannabis market.
news.headline: Bloom cannabis vape brand earns ECCO Certification in California for transparency, trust, enhancing industry standards.

news.summary: Based in Fairfield, New Jersey, 11:11 Systems, a company specializing in managed infrastructure solutions, has received recognition as an Aspiring Provider in the 2024 Gartner Peer Insights™ Voice of the Customer for Disaster Recovery as a Service (DRaaS) report. This is the second year in a row that 11:11 has been acknowledged in this report. The company focuses on empowering customers to modernize, protect, and manage critical applications and data. The emphasis at 11:11 is always on prioritizing customers and addressing their unique business continuity needs.
news.headline: 11:11 Systems recognized in 2024 Gartner report for DRaaS, marking 2nd consecutive year; prioritizes customer needs.

news.summary: In Miami Beach on April 16, 2025, Santa Margherita Rosé and LoveShackFancy partnered in a unique collaboration to mark the beginning of Rosé season. This partnership brings together two renowned brands recognized for their chic style and distinctive pink tones.
news.headline: Santa Margherita & LoveShackFancy launch new limited-edition Rosé Magnum, combining signature pinks. Effortless elegance in Miami.
China open to US talks if Trump shows respect, Bloomberg reports. Stay tuned for updates.
Stock market's music king's fortunes fluctuate dramatically, facing highs and lows post.
Executives confused by new tariffs are a challenge for markets, causing uncertainty and concern.

news.summary: Blue Point Capital Partners and their portfolio company Local Crafts Group have recently acquired Jimmy Beans Wool, a prominent retailer and distributor specializing in high-quality yarn, knitting patterns, and crochet tools. This acquisition will add Jimmy Beans to Local Crafts' collection of brands, which includes Berroco Yarn, Knit Picks, Crochet.com, Connecting Threads, and Superior Threads. Jimmy Beans is recognized for its boutique yarn lines, enhancing the diverse offerings within the Local Crafts Group.
news.headline: Local Crafts, backed by Blue Point, acquires Jimmy Beans Wool, enhancing its craft portfolio.
MSP Recovery reports financial results for FY 2024 and Q4.

news.summary: Munich - Bruker Corporation revealed a majority investment in RECIPE Chemicals + Instruments GmbH, located in Munich, Germany. The investment signifies Bruker's interest in RECIPE that serves as a prominent European supplier of vendor-independent therapeutic drug monitoring (TDM) and various clinical in vitro diagnostic kits for LC-MS/MS, HPLC, and ICP-MS assays. The financial specifics of the deal were not disclosed. With more than 60 employees, RECIPE will still be led by Managing Director Dr. Gerno.
news.headline: Bruker acquires majority stake in RECIPE, a Munich-based mass spectrometry diagnostic kit provider. RECIPE has over 60 employees.

news.summary: Denver-based company Advanced Energy, known for their precision power solutions, will announce its first quarter 2025 financial results after market close on April 30. The management will host a conference call on the same day at 4:30 p.m. Eastern Time. To join the live call, dial 877-407-0890 ten minutes before the scheduled time. Advanced Energy is listed on Nasdaq under the ticker symbol AEIS.
news.headline: Advanced Energy (Nasdaq: AEIS) to report Q1 2025 earnings on April 30 after market close; conference call at 4:30 pm ET.

news.summary: In Paris, ITEN and Baracoda have joined forces to drive innovation at the intersection of health and sustainability. As a key player in micro solid state battery technology, ITEN has partnered with Baracoda, a renowned healthtech company, to enhance energy efficiency in upcoming health tracking devices. Their collaboration has resulted in the development of BHeart, the first self-powered health tracking device. This collaboration symbolizes a new era in health technology, with a focus on sustainability and cutting-edge battery technology.
news.headline: ITEN and Baracoda team up for eco-friendly health tech innovation, promoting energy efficiency for next-gen tracking devices.

news.summary: Cyware, a prominent company specializing in AI-powered threat intelligence management and security collaboration, has introduced a new feature called Compromised Credential Management to their Cyware Intel Packaged Solution. This solution is a ready-made threat intelligence package designed to streamline the process of implementing threat intelligence for security teams. By integrating this new feature, Cyware aims to enhance the speed and efficiency of threat intelligence operations by eliminating the need for intricate integrations and configurations. The Cyware Intel Packaged Solution, built on the foundation of Cyware Intel Exchange, offers a convenient and practical approach for security teams to leverage threat intelligence effectively.
news.headline: Cyware adds Compromised Credential Management to Intel Packaged Solution, simplifying threat intelligence with pre-configured system.

news.summary: GeneDx, a company based in Gaithersburg, Maryland, and traded on Nasdaq under the ticker symbol WGS, revealed its intention to purchase Fabric Genomics, an Oakland, California-based company renowned for its expertise in AI-driven genomic analysis and interpretation. This acquisition marks a significant development in the genomics industry.
news.headline: GeneDx is set to acquire Fabric Genomics, boosting decentralized AI-powered testing globally. Nasdaq: WGS involved.

news.summary: A new tool called EcoVadis Worker Voice has been launched to enhance responsible sourcing and human rights due diligence efforts. The tool aims to facilitate communication between companies and workers in supply chains, allowing them to report grievances and communicate effectively. This initiative is designed to improve transparency and accountability in supply chains. This announcement came from Paris and New York and is expected to impact a significant number of workers and companies globally.
news.headline: EcoVadis Worker Voice enhances responsible sourcing and human rights due diligence globally.

news.summary: In Greensboro, North Carolina on April 16, 2025, the Out of the Garden Project (OOTGP), the primary local nonprofit focused on addressing food insecurity, particularly among children, has unveiled significant changes in its leadership team. This involves the addition of new executives...
news.headline: Out of the Garden Project (OOTGP) wins Change Agent Award and appoints new board members to strengthen leadership. #CombatFoodInsecurity.

news.summary: In London on April 16, 2025, Markel, the insurance branch of Markel Group Inc. (NYSE: MKL), disclosed its plan of acquiring The MECO Group Limited (MECO), a well-established independent company founded in 1974. The agreement is pending regulatory approval and marks a significant move in Markel's expansion strategy.
news.headline: Markel to buy The MECO Group Limited, a specialist marine MGA. Acquisition announced on April 16, 2025. MECO founded in 1974. NYSE: MKL.

news.summary: In Toronto, Organigram Global Inc (NASDAQ: OGI) (TSX: OGI) shared data revealing significant national backing for bolstering Canada's economy through local sectors, specifically the legal cannabis industry. Commissioned by Organigram Global and conducted by Abacus Data from April 3–8, 20251, the survey underscores widespread support for advancing the economy via domestic industries. The Company, identified as Canada's leading cannabis entity based on market share, unveiled these findings during a crucial juncture for the country's economic and political trajectory.
news.headline: Abacus Data poll commissioned by Organigram Global reveals strong support for cannabis in Canada's economic future.

news.summary: A recent report has revealed that approximately 2,500 new cases of COVID-19 have been confirmed in the past 24 hours. This brings the total number of cases in the country to over 150,000. Additionally, 45 more deaths have been reported, increasing the total number of fatalities to nearly 5,000. The government has implemented stricter measures in response to the rising numbers, including mandatory mask mandates and limitations on social gatherings.Experts are advising the public to adhere to these guidelines to help curb the spread of the virus.
news.headline: China says it will open talks with the US if Trump shows respect. Stay tuned for updates.

news.summary: Global Net Lease, Inc. (GNL) will release its financial results for Q1 2025 on May 7, 2025, after the New York Stock Exchange closes. The conference call and audio webcast to discuss results and business performance will be held on May 8, 2025, at 11:00 a.m. ET. The call will be led by GNL's management team, followed by a Q&A session. Interested parties can access the call through GNL's website. Dial-in instructions and replay details will be provided. Make sure to register on the Investor Relations section of the website at least 15 minutes prior to the call. For more details, visit Benzinga.com.
news.headline: Global Net Lease will release Q1 2025 results on May 7, 2025, after close of trading. Conference call on May 8, 2025, at 11:00 a.m. ET to discuss financial results. Live webcast available on their website.

news.summary: In the third annual survey conducted by Autodesk, Inc., a technology company listed on NASDAQ as ADSK, around 6,000 global industry leaders, futurists, and experts in the Design and Make sectors participated. The findings of the 2025 State of Design & Make report were shared in San Francisco on April 16, 2025. This report delves into insights and solutions provided by the participants from various parts of the world.
news.headline: Autodesk's report shows AI skills top hiring priority, with nearly 6,000 industry leaders sharing insights.

news.summary: Panera Bread is unveiling its spring menu filled with seasonal guest favorites along with a new addition, the Strawberry Chicken Caprese Salad. In a press release on April 16, 2025, the company announced the launch of its inventive Croissant Toast sandwiches. These new offerings will be available starting from April 16th. Panera Bread continues to innovate and enhance the dining experience for customers by introducing these fresh menu options.
news.headline: Panera introduces Croissant Toast sandwiches to menus, launches "IT JUST MEALS GOOD™" brand. New salad included. St. Louis, April 16, 2025.

news.summary: White Castle has introduced a new merchandise collection in Columbus, Ohio, on April 16, 2025. The collection includes a variety of items such as a tin lunchbox, pickleball paddle set, playing cards, and T-shirts, among others. The aim is to enhance the iconic Crave experience for customers, offering them unique products. This initiative showcases White Castle's commitment to innovation and customer satisfaction.
news.headline: White Castle introduces bounce house (castle) and new merchandise for Spring 2025 including lunchbox, paddle set, playing cards, and shirts.

news.summary: Genesis Magma Racing has introduced the GMR-001 Hypercar at the New York International Auto Show. This cutting-edge vehicle is the first of its kind and is designed specifically for the FIA World Endurance Championship (WEC) and IMSA SportsCar events. The hypercar, engineered to be an LMDh endurance prototype, is set to make a significant impact in the racing world. This unveiling marks an important milestone for Genesis Magma Racing, with the hypercar showcasing top-notch technology and innovation. Visitors at the auto show can catch a glimpse of this remarkable creation and witness the future of endurance racing up close.
news.headline: Genesis Magma Racing debuts GMR-001 Hypercar at NY Auto Show, designed for WEC and IMSA SportsCar.

news.summary: Author Karen Dix revealed her debut book, Broadway Blessings: A Weekly Devotional of Lessons from Musical Theater, at a celebration in Aurora, Illinois, on April 16, 2025. The event took place at the Paramount Theater, marking the book's release on Amazon. Dix, a new writer, introduces readers to her work and invites them to explore the insights offered in her book.
news.headline: Karen Dix debuts "Broadway Blessings" devotional at Paramount Theater, now on Amazon. Published on April 16, 2025.

news.summary: Potential risks loom over the construction industry as tariffs on building supplies could hinder the ongoing price decreases and slow down new multi-family construction projects. Cities particularly vulnerable to these tariffs include Milwaukee, Oklahoma City, Memphis, Tennessee, Cleveland, Columbus, Ohio, Atlanta, Cincinnati, Birmingham, Alabama, and San Diego. These areas face the possibility of heightened challenges in sustaining construction activity due to the impact of tariffs.
news.headline: Rental prices in almost all U.S. metros higher post-pandemic. Tariffs on building supplies could hinder price drops. Risk seen in markets like Milwaukee, Oklahoma City, and San Diego.

news.summary: In Phoenix on April 16, 2025, Upfit UTV, a subsidiary of Fox Factory known for custom vehicles, partnered with OMI, a top player in electric powertrain engineering, to launch off-road vehicles featuring the OMI Fusion-Drive hybrid system. This collaboration aims to combine Upfit UTV's expertise in purpose-built vehicles with OMI's cutting-edge technology to enhance off-road capabilities.
news.headline: Upfit UTV and OMI collaborate to introduce off-road vehicles with OMI Fusion-Drive, an advanced hybrid system.

news.summary: Today, the application process for the Delta Dental Future Workforce Fund has been launched, aiming to assist programs that encourage school-aged children to consider careers in oral health. In Washington, on April 16, 2025, the Delta Dental Institute restated its commitment to fostering the future.
news.headline: Delta Dental pledges $1 million for oral health workforce development, supporting initiatives for school-aged children.

news.summary: Habitat for Humanity Canada's home ownership program has positively impacted Canada's economy, boosting GDP by $168 million since 2006. The program has also delivered social and health benefits for families, as revealed in a recent report. The study showed that affordable home ownership leads to 28% higher incomes compared to renting. With Canada facing an affordable housing crisis, where home prices in major cities exceed $1.1 million and rental costs are at record highs, the importance of affordable homeownership is highlighted as a strategic economic tool. Benefits of homeownership include improved physical and mental health, increased community engagement, better academic performance for children, and enhanced financial security. These outcomes are linked to homeowners' improved career prospects and reduced stress from unstable housing situations. Habitat for Humanity aims to make homeownership accessible to more working families, emphasizing its importance beyond just a social good.
news.headline: Habitat for Humanity boosts Canada's GDP by $168M since 2006, helping families with affordable homeownership.

news.summary: In Vancouver, British Columbia, on April 16, 2025, the ongoing trade tensions initiated by President Donald Trump have emphasized the need for Canada to diversify its economy. With trade agreements covering approximately 60% of the global economy, Canada is in a favorable position to reduce reliance on U.S. markets. To make informed long-term investment decisions, Canadian governments and businesses need to understand the direction of their trading partners' economies. A recent analysis by Clean Energy Canada reveals that all of Canada's top 10 non-U.S. trade partners have committed to achieving net-zero emissions and have implemented carbon pricing systems. This information underscores the importance of aligning Canada's economic strategies with environmentally sustainable practices.
news.headline: Canada's focus on clean economies with top 10 trade partners with net-zero commitments and carbon pricing systems.

news.summary: An influential independent proxy advisory firm, ISS, has recommended that security holders of Calibre vote in favor of the proposed arrangement with Equinox. The recommendation underscores the support for the deal, emphasizing its potential benefits. This endorsement carries significant weight in the decision-making process, with ISS being a trusted entity in guiding shareholders on such matters. Calibre security holders are advised to consider this recommendation while making their voting decisions.
news.headline: Vote for Calibre and Equinox merger recommended by ISS. Make sure to cast your vote in favor.

news.summary: On April 16, 2025, Generac Holdings Inc. revealed it will report its financial results for the first quarter of 2025 before the market opens on April 30, 2025. Generac, traded as GNRC on NYSE, specializes in energy technology solutions and power products. The company's management will host a conference call at 10:00 a.m. EDT on April 30 to delve into the key points of the earnings release.
news.headline: Generac to release Q1 2025 earnings on April 30, conference call at 10 am EDT. NYSE: GNRC, leading energy tech company.

news.summary: eBay has recently announced a significant partnership aimed at expanding its global payment platform capabilities to improve customer experience and boost operational efficiencies. The partnership was revealed in San Jose, California, and London on April 16, 2025. As a leader in global commerce, eBay plays a pivotal role in connecting millions of buyers and sellers worldwide. This strategic move underscores eBay's commitment to enhancing its services and reaching a broader audience.
news.headline: eBay partners with Checkout.com to enhance global payment platform, boost customer experience.(Characters: 90)

news.summary: Introducing the X Gran Equator Concept, Genesis unveiled a unique blend of elegance and adventure on April 16, 2025 in New York. Bridging on-road sophistication with off-road resilience, this concept vehicle is tailored for individuals in pursuit of a refined yet adventurous driving experience. The concept aims to attract those who appreciate a harmonious combination of luxury and ruggedness in their vehicles.
news.headline: Genesis showcased the X Gran Equator Concept with a blend of elegance and ruggedness, appealing to modern adventurers.
